# Santi020k Theme

> A theme-family monorepo with VS Code and Chrome themes, dedicated websites, Changesets releases, Visual Studio Marketplace publishing, and Open VSX publishing.

## Important Files

- `packages/santi020k-theme/package.json`: VS Code extension manifest, scripts, marketplace metadata, theme contributions.
- `packages/santi020k-theme/themes/santi020k-dark-color-theme.json`: Dark VS Code theme.
- `packages/santi020k-theme/themes/santi020k-light-color-theme.json`: Light VS Code theme.
- `packages/santi020k-chrome-theme/manifest.json`: Chrome dark theme manifest.
- `apps/website/`: Theme hub website for `theme.santi020k.com`.
- `apps/vscode-website/`: VS Code theme website for `vscode.santi020k.com`.
- `apps/chrome-website/`: Chrome theme website for `chrome.santi020k.com`.
- `scripts/validate-themes.mjs`: Theme JSON, token coverage, hex, duplicate-key, and contrast validation.
- `scripts/check-marketplace-readiness.mjs`: Marketplace package preflight checks.
- `scripts/publish-registries.mjs`: Idempotent publisher for Visual Studio Marketplace and Open VSX.
- `.changeset/config.json`: Changesets release configuration.
- `.github/workflows/validate.yml`: CI validation.
- `.github/workflows/release.yml`: Release PR and publish workflow.
- `.github/workflows/changeset-check.yml`: Pull request changeset guard.
- `.vscodeignore`: Controls VSIX contents.
- `docs/architecture.md`: Monorepo boundaries and growth pattern.
- `AGENTS.md`: Instructions for AI coding agents.

## Common Commands

```bash
pnpm run validate:themes
pnpm run validate:marketplace
pnpm run validate
pnpm run package -- --no-dependencies
pnpm run changeset
pnpm run release
```

## Agent Notes

- Keep both theme variants in sync unless asked otherwise.
- Preserve theme identity: dark indigo surfaces, purple/violet accents, calm contrast.
- Add changesets for user-visible changes.
- Validate before release.
- Publishing requires `VSCE_PAT` for Visual Studio Marketplace and `OVSX_PAT` for Open VSX.
